A solid foundation begins with focusing on your daily **sleep hygiene** to wake refreshed. Additionally, dietary choices matter; avoid heavy sugars to protect your **sleep hygiene**. For digital tracking, utilize a specific app to help maintain your **sleep hygiene** routine effectively.<|im_end|>
